query:
SELECT p.id, p.displayName, p.whatsappName, p.totalPoints AS base_points, COALESCE(SUM(DISTINCT bw.points_awarded), 0) AS distinct_boost_sum_possible_issue, COALESCE(boosts.boost_points, 0) AS boost_points, p.totalPoints + COALESCE(boosts.boost_points, 0) AS canonical_points, COUNT(bw.id) AS raw_boost_rows
FROM participants p
LEFT JOIN boost_wins bw ON bw.user_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, SUM(points_awarded) AS boost_points
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id, points_awarded
    FROM boost_wins
  ) deduped
  GROUP BY user_id
) boosts ON boosts.user_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.displayName, p.whatsappName, p.totalPoints, boosts.boost_points
ORDER BY canonical_points DESC
LIMIT 20;
